name: Employer says accident not work-related - fight it?

mainEntity.name: Employer says accident not work-related - fight it?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, appeal if arose out of employment.[1] Context: Scope disputes common; prove duties link.[1][2] Key factors: Schedules, tasks evidence. Practical guidance: Gather coworker statements; Labor hearing. Wins frequent with proof. Don't accept denial.
